description: Address 5 code review issues: document grid-to-shader limitation, remove dead RainFilter, fix refill iteration order dependency, document intentional wind param behavior, clarify windAngle naming.
steps: Add KDoc to SnowFilter and BloodFilter documenting grid-to-shader gap as a known prototype limitation
Remove dead RainFilter construction and unused import from PhysicsTestScene
Add double-buffer approach to SnowGrid.refill using a snapshot array
Add TODO comment to SnowGrid.accumulate explaining wind params are intentionally unused in accumulation (drives shader only)
Add KDoc to SnowFilter.windAngle and RainFilter.windAngle clarifying usage as linear shear factor, not angular value
acceptance_criteria: Dead RainFilter code is removed from PhysicsTestScene
SnowGrid.refill uses a snapshot for deterministic spatial behavior
KDoc comments clarify prototype limitations and naming
findings: All 5 review issues addressed. Double-buffer in SnowGrid.refill ensures deterministic spatial behavior. Dead RainFilter removed. KDoc clarifies windAngle is a shear factor. Both :core:desktopTest and :game:compileKotlinDesktop pass cleanly.
